sourcePolicy: Public-safe generalized heuristic. Contains no extracted assets, paths, names, proprietary values, or private reports.

cards.title: Mobile RPG Window System
cards.summary: Large mobile RPG interfaces should separate feature windows, shared components, notification states, and reward feedback.
designRules: Use shared reward, inventory, upgrade, and currency components.
Make notification-dot state explicit in the data model.
Design repeated screens for quick scanning and one-handed interaction.
cards.mgaiUsage: Generate WindowSpec, SharedComponentSpec, NotificationSpec, and RewardFeedbackSpec for each feature.

cards.title: Readable Reward and Combat Feedback
cards.summary: Repeated game feedback should be short, staged, readable, and scaled by event importance.
designRules: Use a five-stage feedback sequence: anticipation, action, impact, result, confirmation.
Keep common interactions short; reserve longer animations for rare milestones.
Avoid stacking too many glow and particle effects on mobile screens.
cards.mgaiUsage: Generate FeedbackSpec with duration, easing, intensity, interruption policy, and accessibility fallback.

cards.title: Paid Cosmetic Preview Flow
cards.summary: Paid cosmetics need a clear preview, value explanation, ownership state, and reward reveal flow.
designRules: Separate preview interaction from purchase confirmation.
Show ownership, locked, equipped, and claimable states distinctly.
Use reveal motion to celebrate acquisition, not to obscure price or ownership.
cards.mgaiUsage: Generate CosmeticOfferFlow with preview, purchase, owned, equipped, and reveal states.
